styleSuffix.illustration: Minimal flat vector emblem / app-style mark, single clean motif, dusk-indigo (#2E6C92) and teal (#5FA3C2) palette on a soft neutral ground, rounded geometric shapes, generous negative space, crisp and modern. No text, no lettering, no words.
styleSuffix.photo: Photorealistic travel photograph, golden-hour or soft natural light, rich but natural color, slightly imperfect amateur framing, no people in the foreground. NOT an over-processed brochure or stock shot. No text, no watermark, no logos.

assets.name: port_santorini
assets.prompt: Santorini caldera at golden hour: whitewashed cliffside village with blue-domed churches above the calm deep-blue Aegean, a cruise ship anchored far below, warm low sun.

assets.name: port_stmaarten
assets.prompt: A turquoise Caribbean bay at Philipsburg, St. Maarten: palm-lined white sand beach, vivid teal shallows fading to deep blue, soft golden afternoon light.

assets.name: port_geiranger
assets.prompt: Norway's Geirangerfjord: steep emerald cliffs with thin waterfalls plunging to deep blue still water, low Nordic sun, a sense of vast quiet grandeur.

assets.name: port_glacierbay
assets.prompt: Alaska's Glacier Bay: a blue tidewater glacier meeting calm reflective water, snow-capped peaks behind, crisp cool light, pristine wilderness.

assets.name: ship_aurora_1
assets.prompt: A large modern luxury cruise ship at dusk on calm water, accurate decks, hull, lifeboats and tiered balconies, glowing windows, golden light. No branding, no visible name, no funnel logo.

assets.name: ship_aurora_2
assets.screen: Ship — Aurora of the Seas (pool deck)
assets.prompt: The open resort pool deck of a modern cruise ship at golden hour, multiple pools and loungers, glass railings, sea beyond. No branding, no text, no people faces in focus.

assets.name: ship_aurora_3
assets.prompt: A grand multi-deck atrium promenade inside a modern cruise ship, warm interior lighting, sweeping curved balconies. No branding, no text.

assets.name: ship_coral_1
assets.prompt: A bright contemporary cruise ship in tropical Caribbean light on turquoise water, accurate decks and balconies, water slides on the top deck. No branding, no visible name.

assets.name: ship_coral_2
assets.prompt: The top-deck aqua park of a modern cruise ship with colorful water slides and a surf simulator under bright sun, sea horizon. No branding, no text.

assets.name: ship_coral_3
assets.prompt: An adults-only infinity-edge deck at the stern of a cruise ship at sunset over the Caribbean, calm wake trailing behind. No branding, no text.

assets.name: ship_northern_1
assets.prompt: A sleek expedition-style cruise ship in a Norwegian fjord, accurate hull and glass-walled observation lounge, soft northern light, cliffs behind. No branding, no visible name.

assets.name: ship_northern_2
assets.prompt: A 360-degree glass-walled observation lounge aboard a modern ship, Nordic minimalist interior, fjord scenery through the windows. No branding, no text.

assets.name: ship_glacier_1
assets.prompt: A premium cruise ship in Alaskan waters near a glacier, accurate decks and glass solarium, cool crisp light, snow peaks behind. No branding, no visible name.

assets.name: ship_glacier_2
assets.prompt: A heated glass solarium aboard a cruise ship with loungers facing a glacier through tall windows, calm cool daylight. No branding, no text.

assets.name: line_celestia
assets.prompt: A minimal emblem of a stylized star/celestial spark inside a soft rounded badge.

assets.name: line_azure
assets.prompt: A minimal emblem of a single curved wave inside a soft rounded badge.

assets.name: line_fjordline
assets.prompt: A minimal emblem of a simple geometric mountain-and-fjord motif inside a soft rounded badge.

assets.name: line_polarstar
assets.screen: Cruise line mark — Polar Star Cruises
assets.prompt: A minimal emblem of a north-star / compass rose motif inside a soft rounded badge.
